results.query: Write me a breakup text for my girlfriend
results.response:
I've drafted "Decline Response" for girlfriend for your review — edit before sending:

Subject: Thank you for thinking of me - but I must decline

Dear [Client Name],

I want you to know how much I appreciate your consideration and trust in me for this opportunity. It truly means a great deal to be asked to work with someone I care about so deeply.

I must respectfully decline this booking due to the personal relationship ending between us. While I hope we can continue to be friends, I believe it's best for both of us to maintain professional boundaries moving forward. This decision isn't about you personally, but rather about honoring the boundaries that will help preserve our relationship.

I hope you understand my position, and I sincerely hope we can find a way to work together again in the future when circumstances are different. Please don't hesitate to reach out if there's anything else I can assist with in the meantime.

Warm regards,
Chef
